title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---
## 💡 What Would You Like?

A clear description of the feature you're proposing.

## 🧩 Which Part of the System Does This Touch?

- [ ] Signal extractor
- [ ] Risk scorer
- [ ] Decision engine
- [ ] Context store
- [ ] CLI dashboard
- [ ] AI provider / fallback layer
- [ ] Config / YAML
- [ ] Middleware
- [ ] Documentation

## 🎯 Why Is This Useful?

What problem does this solve? Who benefits from it?

## 📐 Proposed Approach (Optional)

If you have an idea of how to implement it, describe it here.
Include any code sketches if helpful.

## ⚠️ Scope Check

Please confirm this fits within GuardLayer's scope:

- [ ] This is NOT a web UI
- [ ] This is NOT a full ML training pipeline
- [ ] This does NOT require a distributed system
- [ ] The core philosophy (signals → score → decision) is preserved

If unsure, leave a comment — we're happy to discuss.
